name: Happened at work but subcontractor caused it in Boise—double dip possible?

mainEntity.name: Happened at work but subcontractor caused it in Boise—double dip possible?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, full workers' comp from employer AND third-party suit against sub—no double recovery, but credits apply.** Allowed[2]. **Key factors:** 1. Idaho Code permits. 2. Sub not immune. 3. Total exceeds comp. 4. Coordination needed. Pursue both tracks with lawyer.
